# Self-Evolving Retrainer — Prompt Optimization

> Shadow-gated prompt optimization system for Genesis Conductor.
> Part of the Ambient Access Layer infrastructure.

## Features
- Automated prompt optimization
- Shadow-gated testing
- Ralph micro-optimization slices
- Continuous improvement loop

## Integration
- Core component of Genesis Conductor
- Powers Ambient Access Layer routing
- A2A protocol compliant

## Creator
Igor Holt — AI Architect
Genesis Conductor Engine
